narrative:
Leandro Trossard is a Left Winger for Belgium, demonstrating elite performance at this tournament. His overall rating of 7.71/10 places him in the top 1% of left wingers competing. This rating reflects a strong blend of recent club form and his current World Cup contributions.

At this World Cup, Trossard has been highly effective, registering 0.499 goals per 90 minutes and 0.249 assists per 90 minutes across 361 minutes played. His creative prowess is evident with 3.989 key passes per 90 minutes and an impressive 0.431 expected assists per 90 minutes. Despite this, his 0.997 shots per 90 minutes suggest efficiency or a primary role as a facilitator rather than a high-volume shooter.

Trossard clearly serves as a pivotal creative and offensive outlet for Belgium from the left flank. Scouts should continue to monitor his exceptional rate of key passes and expected assists, which are significantly higher than his club xA of 0.229. His ability to maintain a high goal output from relatively few shots will be crucial for Belgium's progression in the tournament.
